claim_boundary: The Hodge map does not force equal independent action coefficients.
evidence_against: no action symmetry fixes coefficient equality
evidence_for: orthonormal expansion has unit geometric Hodge factors
orientation_convention: positive e1 wedge e2 wedge e3; reversing orientation flips all Hodge signs
orthonormal_formula: *(e1 wedge e2)=e3; *(e2 wedge e3)=e1; *(e3 wedge e1)=e2
orthonormal_map: *(e1 wedge e2)=e3; *(e2 wedge e3)=e1; *(e3 wedge e1)=e2
raw_berger_formula: *(sigma1 wedge sigma2)=(r_fiber/r_base^2)sigma3; *(sigma2 wedge sigma3)=(1/r_fiber)sigma1; *(sigma3 wedge sigma1)=(1/r_fiber)sigma2
raw_berger_map: *(sigma1 wedge sigma2)=(r_fiber/r_base^2)sigma3; *(sigma2 wedge sigma3)=(1/r_fiber)sigma1; *(sigma3 wedge sigma1)=(1/r_fiber)sigma2
